plugins.name: dhpk
plugins.description: Generic Claude Code harness — 15 role-based agents, ~65 commands, ~50 core skills, 6-slot sentinel-driven review hooks (code/db/sec/frontend/doc/polyfill), opt-in stack modules across PHP (5.6, 7.4, 8.x), Yii (1.1), PHPUnit (5.7, 9, 10, 11), Laravel (6–11), JS, plus the library-author cross-cutting module for multi-major-version libraries. Wrapper-dispatch hook extension model, parallel Codex CLI tree.
